gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward, smiles broadly, and gestures with both hands toward the colorful objects on the screen.
a person tilts their head slightly and raises one hand, inviting the class to share their thoughts about the groups.
a tutor moves both hands together in a sweeping motion, suggesting the combining of the two groups of objects.
a person nods enthusiastically while using one hand to mimic counting, emphasizing the addition of both groups.
a tutor crouches slightly, opens both arms wide, and invites the learners to join in counting the new objects.
a person stands tall, looks around at the class, and gestures with both hands while asking about the total count.
a tutor raises both arms in celebration, smiling widely to acknowledge the students' hard work in learning addition.
a person gestures with one hand toward the objects, reinforcing the message about combining groups and finding totals.
